note: She is more capable than anyone on this board. Vouch without qualification.
She can handle herself better than most. Trust her with anything.
Fast learner. Reliable. Doesn't panic under pressure. Rare qualities.
Met her under extraordinary circumstances. Acquitted herself impeccably.
Good lass. Solid contact. Doesn't ask for more than the job requires.
I wrote a ballad about her. That should tell you everything you need to know.
Trained her myself. I don't say that lightly.
Taught me everything. Trust him with your life. I have. More than once.
Exasperating. Reliable. I'd rather work with him than anyone else on the Continent.
Best contact I have. Surly but dependable. The surliness is part of the package.
Saved my life twice. Saved my cargo once. Good witcher, better contact.
Exceptionally trustworthy for a human. Highest recommendation.
Long history. Trustworthy. Leave it at that.
I trained him. I'll vouch for him.
Unreliable when personal matters interfere with professional obligations. Which is always.
She taught me to be ruthless when it matters. Invaluable contact. Don't waste her time.
Extremely capable. Extremely dangerous. Highly recommended for anything that requires both.
Precise, demanding, occasionally terrifying. Exactly the kind of person you want handling sensitive acquisitions.
Competent. Reliable. We have history but that doesn't affect the professional assessment.
A sorceress worth trusting. I don't say that often.
He has contacts everywhere. Information moves through him like water. Useful, if you can tolerate the songs.
Talks too much. Knows everyone. Net positive.
Good prices, fair dealing. Buys me drinks sometimes. Five stars.
Talks. Constantly. About everything. To everyone. Do not share sensitive information with this man.
He wrote a song about Kaer Morhen. An unflattering one. We're not on good terms.
A liability. Everything he learns becomes a song within the fortnight.
Reliable. Discrete. Doesn't ask unnecessary questions. Recommend without reservation.
Known him for years. Never been burned. Good dwarf.
Do not trust. Will use you and discard you the moment it's convenient. Ask me how I know.
Solid. Dependable. Has never once let commerce get in the way of friendship, which is rare.
Unusual contact but exceptionally discreet. Recommended for sensitive work.
